qa_pair.question: In the web_v2 first-run flow, the step state is modeled as a four-value string union. Return those four values as a comma-separated string in source order.
The onboarding flow writes a browser flag so returning users skip the intro sequence. What is the exact localStorage key? Return the key only.
When that onboarding-complete flag is present, which route does the web_v2 welcome flow redirect to? Return the path only.
The project naming step shows four preset suggestion chips. Which suggestion appears fourth in source order? Return the label exactly.
On the final onboarding screen, one suggested next action is about embedding social proof on an existing site. What is the exact label of that action?
qa_pair.answer: Add a widget to your site

qa_pair.question: What is the exact package manager pin declared at the root of this monorepo? Return the full string.
Which root package script configures Git to use the repository's custom hooks directory? Return the script name only.
What path does the Git hook installation script configure as core.hooksPath? Return the path only.
Which workspace package is explicitly described as providing shared TypeScript types for the Tresta workspace? Return the package name only.
In the new OpenCode MCP package, what default model identifier is used when no model is supplied? Return only the model ID.
